description: Product Description meioro Rectangle Striped Tassels Tablecloth Cotton Linen Stain and Wrinkle Resistant Washable SquareTable Cloth Cover for Indoor or Outdoor Events Parties Tablecloths with striped patterns and handmade tassels add elegance to any dining room. It fits perfectly with your living style and will not only decorate your room but also improve your mood. Tablecloth Design The rectangular tablecloth has a classic striped design that adds a touch of elegance to any dining room. Delicate Fringes The material of the table protector provides a pleasant and luxurious feel, which is further enhanced by the delicate and beautiful cotton tassels that hang down naturally. The rustic tablecloth is made of new, high-quality cotton and polyester, which does not stain or crease, is soft and durable. It is also non-slip, crease-resistant and scratch-resistant for long-lasting use. To accommodate different table sizes, our rectangular tablecloths are available in different sizes for small and medium tables. For an exact measurement, we recommend adding 50 cm to the length of the table (25 cm on each side) to achieve a better draping effect. The rectangular tablecloths are also suitable for outdoor use, making them ideal for Christmas, New Year's Eve, birthday parties, weddings, brunches, buffets, picnics, catering, restaurants, hotels and even patio tables. meioro tablecloth Tablecloth Solid Color Add To Basket Clear PE Tablecloths Add To Basket Polyester Table Cloth Add To Basket Wipe Clean Tablecloth Add To Basket Rectangular Tablecloth Add To Basket Cotton Linen Table Cloth Add To Basket Crochet Table Runners Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,408 3.5 out of 5 stars 310 4.3 out of 5 stars 101 4.2 out of 5 stars 32 4.0 out of 5 stars 1,739 4.0 out of 5 stars 1,739 4.6 out of 5 stars 455 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £19.99 £ 19 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Material Polyester and Linen PE Polyester Polyester Cotton and Polyester Cotton and Polyester Polyester Machine Washable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Crease free ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Quality ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Occasion Home Decoration Home Decoration Home Decoration Home Decoration Home Decoration Home Decoration Home Decoration
